title: Biodiversity Assessment of Coral Reef Ecosystems in Jagna Bay
description: A comprehensive survey of coral reef biodiversity in Jagna Bay, documenting species richness and community structure using belt transect and point-count methods. The study aims to establish baseline biodiversity data for long-term monitoring.

title: Taxonomy and Distribution of Marine Molluscs in the Bohol Sea
description: Systematic documentation of mollusc species diversity and spatial distribution patterns across selected intertidal and subtidal sites in the Bohol Sea, with focus on gastropods, bivalves, and cephalopods.

title: DNA Barcoding of Selected Marine Gastropods in Central Visayas
description: Molecular identification of marine gastropods using COI gene barcoding to resolve taxonomic ambiguities and establish reference sequences for Philippine marine species registered in BOLD and GenBank.

title: Water Quality Monitoring and Coral Health Index in Jagna Marine Sanctuary
description: Seasonal assessment of physicochemical water quality parameters — including temperature, salinity, turbidity, dissolved oxygen, and nutrient levels — and their correlation with coral health indices in the Jagna Marine Sanctuary.
